tasks.title: Report the AI's capability grants and credential surface
tasks.description: Use get_capability_grants for the per-agent capability toggles (e.g. open_draft_pr), power flags and grant audit history, and get_credential_inventory for the GitHub connections and repo allowlists the AI can reach.
